title: Unearthed
description: Unearth new artifacts and fossils with this brand new modpack featuring some new technology and new transportation methods!
body:
# Unearthed

Starting from a modpack I wanted to make for friends focusing on some fun planes and boats while making Minecraft's archeology and exploration much better. The terrain is really cool, structures are fresh, and you won't need a typical boat, get a large one with extra storage, or build a plane to travel further distances!

## Also check out [Unrooted](https://modrinth.com/modpack/unrooted)
Unrooted is like if Unearthed added technology focus into the mix, the reason I've seperated the two is because I want to make sure everyone has their own way of playing. I know many people who don't like technology mods including myself with regards to a few conviluted mods.

Looking for a lightweight version focused around archeology? Try out Unearthed instead! Note that I will no longer be updating Unearthed after v1.3.4

<details>
<summary># What's inside? 👀</summary>
  
> ## ⚒️ Archeology Tweaks
>  With additions like Better Archeology and Archeology Plus, you'll find more things hidden under the ground and in the ocean with new blocks, loot, items, banner patterns, and much more to unearth!
> ## ✈️ Continental Transportation
>  Immersive Aircraft and Small Ships take both means of transport whether it be by air or sea, you'll be able to traverse the map, find loot, store extra inventory with a number of new inventions such as the Gyrodyne, Biplanes, Cogs, Galleys, and more ways to travel around the map in its semi-realistic generation
> ## 🌍 A Whole New World
>  Cliche title, but the world generation has been completely revamped. Tectonic & Continents make the world feel realistic, yet still keeping that feeling of Minecraft. New biomes that could've been, more structures, as well as Create Structures added for early-game create builds!
> ## ⚙️ *Create* Your Own World
>  I've added Create as well as some expansions such as Crafts & Additions, Ore Excavation, and Steam 'n' Rails fittingly for transportation
> ## 🪐 *Ad*-ing More
>  Ad Astra is installed for some off-planet exploration if you really don't like the regular dimensions as well as expansions to the nether with Cinderscapes and the end with BetterEnd. Find out more history about your world among the stars and deep underground.
</details>

There's a lot more to explore, hop into a new world and explore what the pack has to offer!

<details>
<summary>Known Issues</summary>

- Closing a world or leaving a server and joining another/the same world/server will cause the game to crash. Serverside crashes for a number of reasons too, this is most likely due to the double world generation with Continents *and* Terralith, next update I'll be removing Continents. Try allocating more memory as it doesn't always happen.
- Loading modpack takes a little while :/

</details>
